summary: Iteration 16: Comprehensive testing of the new multi-step registration wizard (3 steps). All 18 features verified successfully. Frontend wizard has correct data-testids, backend accepts all new fields (country, city, postal_code, email, phone, nationality, tshirt_size, club_name, ffa_license) and FFA 3€ discount logic works correctly.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: STEP 1 - Nom (last_name) field exists with data-testid=reg-last-name
STEP 1 - Prénom (first_name) field exists with data-testid=reg-first-name
STEP 1 - Sexe dropdown exists with data-testid=reg-gender
STEP 1 - Date de naissance: Jour dropdown with data-testid=reg-birth-day
STEP 1 - Date de naissance: Mois dropdown with data-testid=reg-birth-month
STEP 1 - Date de naissance: Année dropdown with data-testid=reg-birth-year
STEP 1 - Age display shows correctly when date filled (reg-age-display)
STEP 1 - Pays dropdown exists with data-testid=reg-country
STEP 1 - Ville field exists with data-testid=reg-city
STEP 1 - Code postal field exists with data-testid=reg-postal
STEP 1 - Email field exists with data-testid=reg-email
STEP 1 - Téléphone field exists with data-testid=reg-phone
STEP 1 - Nationalité dropdown exists with data-testid=reg-nationality
STEP 1 - Validation prevents proceeding without required fields
STEP 2 - 3 race cards displayed: Trail 42km (95€), Ultra 80km (145€), UTMB 170km (250€)
STEP 2 - T-shirt sizes: XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL buttons all present
STEP 2 - Emergency contact name field (reg-emergency-name)
STEP 2 - Emergency contact phone field (reg-emergency-phone)
STEP 2 - Club name optional field (reg-club)
STEP 2 - Validation prevents proceeding without T-shirt selection
STEP 3 - PPS input field (reg-pps-input)
STEP 3 - PPS verify button (reg-pps-verify)
STEP 3 - PPS link to athle.fr (reg-pps-link)
STEP 3 - FFA license input field (reg-ffa-input)
STEP 3 - FFA verify button (reg-ffa-verify)
STEP 3 - FFA license validation: >=6 chars triggers 3€ discount
STEP 3 - FFA discount appears in price summary: -3.00€
STEP 3 - Promo code input field (reg-promo-input)
STEP 3 - Promo code apply button (reg-promo-apply)
STEP 3 - Price summary with breakdown (reg-price-summary)
STEP 3 - Confirm and pay button (confirm-register-btn)
NAVIGATION - 3-step progress bar updates correctly
NAVIGATION - Back button works from Step 2 to Step 1
NAVIGATION - Back button works from Step 3 to Step 2
BACKEND - Login successful: pierre@test.com / test1234
BACKEND - Event GET returns races with counters
BACKEND - Registration endpoint accepts all new fields
BACKEND - FFA license >= 6 chars triggers 3€ discount server-side
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby attribute (accessibility warning)
seed_data_creation: User pierre@test.com may already be registered to evt_db0c7b851cb9 - 'Already registered' is expected behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16: Verified multi-step registration wizard. Test event: evt_db0c7b851cb9 (Trail du Mont Blanc 2026) with 3 races. Key data-testids: STEP1: reg-step-indicator, reg-last-name, reg-first-name, reg-gender, reg-birth-day/month/year, reg-age-display, reg-country, reg-city, reg-postal, reg-email, reg-phone, reg-nationality, reg-step-next-1. STEP2: reg-race-{name}, reg-tshirt-grid, reg-tshirt-{size}, reg-emergency-name, reg-emergency-phone, reg-club, reg-step-prev-2, reg-step-next-2. STEP3: reg-pps-input, reg-pps-verify, reg-pps-link, reg-ffa-input, reg-ffa-verify, reg-promo-input, reg-promo-apply, reg-price-summary, reg-step-prev-3, confirm-register-btn. Backend RegistrationCreate accepts: country, city, postal_code, email, phone, nationality, tshirt_size, club_name, ffa_license. FFA discount: -3€ if ffa_license.length >= 6.
features_verified: Step 1 - Personal information form with all required fields
Step 1 - Auto age calculation when birth date is filled
Step 1 - Email/phone can be pre-filled from user account
Step 1 - Validation prevents proceeding with empty required fields
Step 2 - Race selection via clickable cards
Step 3 - PPS section with verify button and athle.fr link
Step 3 - FFA license section with 3€ discount logic
Step 3 - Price summary with FFA discount displayed
Backend accepts all new registration fields
